# NH AI Meetup

> New Hampshire's community for AI enthusiasts, professionals, and learners. Join us for meetups, presentations, and discussions about artificial intelligence.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/)
- [Meetings](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/meetings)
- [Schedule](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/schedule)
- [Blog](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/blog)
- [Materials & Resources](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/materials)
- [AI Assistant](https://nh-ai-meetup.com/assistant)
